questions.question:
If an atom contains one electron
and one proton, will it carry any
charge or not?

On the basis of Rutherford’s
s model of an atom, which sub-
d atomic particle is present in the
nucleus of an atom?
e 3. Draw a sketch of Bohr’s model
of an atom with three shells.

What do you think would be the
observation if the α-particle
scattering experiment is carried
out using a foil of a metal other
than gold?

Helium atom has an atomic mass
of 4 u and two protons in its
nucleus. How many neutrons
does it have?

Write the distribution of electrons
in carbon and sodium atoms.

If K and L shells of an atom are
full, then what would be the total
number of electrons in the atom?

If number of electrons in an atom
is 8 and number of protons is also
8, then

subparts.label: i
subparts.text:
what is the atomic
number of the atom? and (ii) what
is the charge on the atom?

questions.question:
With the help of Table 4.1, find
out the mass number of oxygen
and sulphur atom.
